description: Quoted local-part containing a space character (allowed under RFC 5322).
Domain lacking a dot/TLD, valid for local mail servers and intranets.
IPv4 domain literal inside square brackets instead of a domain name.
Local-part containing all allowed special characters without quotes.
Deeply nested subdomain structure stretching boundary lengths.
Internationalized Email Address (EAI) containing non-ASCII Unicode characters (RFC 6530).
